---
title: "Projects"
---

# Projects

## Heart Disease Prediction

### Objective
Predict cardiovascular disease risk using machine learning models.

### Methods
- Logistic Regression
- Random Forest
- XGBoost

### Results
XGBoost achieved strong predictive performance on test data.

### Tools
Python, Scikit-learn, Pandas, Matplotlib

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/DataWale)

---

## Human Stress Prediction

### Objective
Analyze stress indicators using machine learning techniques.

### Methods
- Data preprocessing
- Feature engineering
- Classification models

### Tools
Python, Pandas, Scikit-learn

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/DataWale)

---

## Cancer Incidence Analysis

### Objective
Study cancer trends and incidence patterns using epidemiological data.

### Methods
- Statistical analysis
- Visualization
- Trend analysis

### Tools
R, ggplot2, dplyr

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/DataWale)
